name: Get Asset Content
description: Retrieves the binary content payload of an asset. The 'id' argument accepts any resolvable address: hex hash, /a/<hash>, /o/<name>, /v/<path>, DID URL, or workspace path. Hash-form refs read directly from the content-addressed store; for other forms the value is resolved, its CAD3 hash derived, and the corresponding CAS record fetched (so a workspace map that has never been stored as an asset returns exists: false, but a /v/ops/ entry that does have a CAS record will resolve correctly). Content is always a Blob, returned as a hex string in JSON. Returns truncated: true with the size if the content exceeds maxSize (default 1 MB). Use asset:get to retrieve metadata.

id.description: Asset reference. Any resolvable address: hex hash, /a/<hash>, /o/<name>, /v/<path>, DID URL, or workspace path (w/, g/, j/, etc.).

maxSize.description: Maximum content size in bytes (default 1000000). If exceeded, returns truncated: true with the size.

exists.description: True if a CAS record was found for the resolved asset

value.description: Content as hex-encoded Blob (0x...). Present when exists is true and not truncated.

size.description: Content size in bytes (present when truncated)
